prompt: The file solution.py contains a working but slow fp16 GEMM kernel written in TileLang. Optimize it so that build(M, N, K) returns a compiled kernel computing C = A @ B as fast as possible on the GPU, while remaining numerically correct (rtol=1e-2, atol=1e-2). You may change block sizes, pipeline stages, thread count, add L2 swizzling, layout annotations, etc. The returned kernel must be callable as kernel(A, B) -> C. Only edit solution.py.
